hci_student_group.description: Student-led organization that fosters community within the extreme diversity of the HCI program.
hci_student_group.mission: Inspire intellectual exchange and research collaborations among Iowa State faculty, students, staff, and the external HCI community.
hci_student_group.contact_info: Contact executive officers for more information.
hci_student_group.membership: Encouraged for all HCI students to get to know others and their areas of research outside typical disciplines.

networking_resources.name: Human Computer Interaction - Iowa State University LinkedIn Group
networking_resources.purpose: Support professional networking among students, faculty, staff, affiliates, and alumni of the HCI program at ISU.

networking_resources.name: Experiencing UX - Central Iowa
networking_resources.description: Community focused on the collaborative sharing of User Experience topics in the Des Moines and Central Iowa area.
networking_resources.membership: Inclusive mix of UX professionals, hobbyists, and HCI/UX students.
